articles.title: Only one leader has the upper hand in Trump-Xi China meeting

children.content: Nine years after his last meeting with Xi Jinping in China, Donald Trump is more aggressive and assertive. But so is Beijing. And its president is ready to take the geopolitical and economic lead.

image.altText: Donald Trump and Xi Jinping react as they hold a bilateral meeting.

children.content: The war in Iran, Taiwan, trade, tariffs and AI could all feature in Donald Trump's first visit to Beijing in nearly nine years. Follow live.

items.title: ISIS brides' arrest in Australia prompts anger in Syrian camp

children.content: The arrest of three Australian women linked to the Islamic State group sparks anger and frustration inside the Syrian refugee camp where they had lived for years.

items.title: PM says taxes before Labor changes were not 'even', ahead of Taylor budget reply

items.title: Coalition to propose permanent end to tax bracket creep

children.content: The Coalition will make a bold play to win back voters with a plan to automatically index income tax brackets to keep up with inflation.

items.title: Email reveals Jewish group warned police about Bondi gunman in 2019

children.content: A Jewish security agency raised concerns about Bondi Beach gunman Naveed Akram years before the terror attack that left 15 people dead, a document shows.

items.title: Coles found to have misled shoppers in bombshell Federal Court case

children.content: Supermarket giant Coles broke consumer law by misleading shoppers on discount prices, a Federal Court judge has found.

articles.title: ASX falls, with Coles down -2.5 per cent on news it misled customers

children.content: The ASX 200 is down this afternoon, led by falls in IT and consumer staples. Follow the day's events and insights from our business reporters on the ABC News live markets blog.

items.title: Power to cut funding and stricter 'permanence' test under new NDIS

children.content: Legislation designed to save $35 billion in NDIS spending is introduced to parliament, revealing new powers for the minister to cut funding to classes of supports, automate some decisions and create requirements for prospective participants to exhaust all other treatment options before entering the NDIS.

items.title: Entire university sector accused of antisemitism failure

children.content: The special envoy on antisemitism has found not a single Australian university has met its requirements for adopting a definition of antisemitism.

items.title: Knife incident at Korean Antarctic base triggers evacuation

children.content: An Antarctic expeditioner who allegedly threatened colleagues with a bladed weapon has been removed from a Korean research station in a rare mid-winter evacuation.

items.title: Australian hantavirus ship passengers to depart for home today

items.title: Oldest evidence of dentistry found in 59,000-year-old Neanderthal tooth

children.content: Archaeologists have found a hole in a 59,000-year-old tooth, which they say was drilled to treat a painful cavity. The find suggests Neanderthals could perform complex medical procedures.

items.title: MPs join calls for mayor in Melbourne to resign over character reference saga

items.title: Tiny frogs on the brink of extinction released into NSW national park

children.content: More than 800 tiny, technicolour northern corroboree frogs have been released into the wild to try to bolster the numbers of one of Australia's most critically endangered amphibians.
